metadata.title: StickerTrack | Organize your collections
metadata.description: An independent tool for tracking sticker collections.

dashboard.title: Welcome to your catalog
dashboard.description: Explore published collections and find every item by name or code.
dashboard.empty: No collections are available right now.

catalog.loadError: The catalog could not be loaded.
catalog.detailError: The sticker details could not be loaded.

details.name: Name
details.noPlayer: This sticker has no associated player.

myCollections.title: My collections
myCollections.description: Track what you own, what is missing, and which stickers are duplicates.
myCollections.empty: You have not started a collection yet. Open the catalog to begin.
myCollections.loadError: Your personal collection could not be loaded.

scanner.title: Add a sticker by code
scanner.description: Use the camera to read the code on the back of the sticker or type it manually.
scanner.cameraPositionHint: Place the sticker code inside the highlighted area.
scanner.imageAdjustmentHint: Drag the image and adjust the zoom until the code is inside the highlighted area.
scanner.cameraPrivacy: The image is processed locally and is not sent or stored.
scanner.cameraReady: The camera starts only after you grant access.
scanner.permissionDenied: Camera permission was denied. Allow access in the browser or use manual entry.
scanner.cameraNotSupported: This browser does not provide compatible camera access.
scanner.secureContextRequired: The camera requires HTTPS in production. Use manual entry in this context.
scanner.noCamera: No camera was found on this device.
scanner.cameraBusy: The camera is being used by another application or tab.
scanner.recognitionError: The code could not be captured or recognized.
scanner.debugPreviewAlt: Temporary preview of the processed region
scanner.debugFramePreviewAlt: Full captured frame with the OCR crop highlighted
scanner.ocrNoTextDescription: No readable text was found in the selected region.
scanner.ocrNoCandidateDescription: OCR found text, but no code compatible with this collection.
scanner.chooseCode: Choose the code printed on the sticker.
scanner.inputLabel: Type the code on the back of the sticker
scanner.invalidDescription: Enter a code containing a letter prefix and a number.
scanner.notFoundDescription: No sticker with this code was found in this collection.
scanner.successDescription: {code} was added to your personal collection.
scanner.resolveError: The code could not be resolved. Try again.
scanner.confirmError: The sticker could not be added. Review the scan and try again.

home.title: Keep track of every item in your collection.
home.description: StickerTrack is being prepared to organize albums and other collections without relying on official images.
home.phaseSetup: A modern technical foundation ready to grow.
home.phaseLanguages: Portuguese, English, and Spanish from the first visit.
home.phaseAuth: Registration, sign-in, and an account-linked language preference.

auth.name: Name
auth.loginDescription: Sign in to continue organizing your collection.
auth.registerDescription: Start with a free and independent account.
auth.noAccount: Do not have an account yet?
auth.forgotDescription: Enter your email. If an account exists, recovery instructions will be sent.
auth.forgotSuccess: If an account exists for this email, instructions have been sent.
auth.resetDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in...
auth.resetInvalid: The recovery link is missing or invalid.
auth.recoveryError: Recovery could not be completed. The link may have expired.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: This route demonstrates protected access and persisted preferences.
profile.name: Name
profile.sessionRequired: Sign in to view your profile.
profile.deleteDescription: This removes your collections and scans, anonymizes your account, and ends your session. It cannot be undone.
profile.deleteError: The account could not be deleted. Check the password or administrator protection.

admin.importsDescription: Validate and import a catalog file supplied by an administrator.
admin.fileValid: The file is valid and ready to import.
admin.author: Author
admin.requestError: The administrative request could not be completed.

errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists.
errors.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: The email or password is invalid.
errors.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: The request could not be completed.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.STICKER_CODE_NOT_FOUND: No sticker was found for this code.
errors.SCAN_ALREADY_CONFIRMED: This scan has already been confirmed.
errors.SCAN_STICKER_MISMATCH: The sticker does not match the resolved scan.
errors.SCAN_DOES_NOT_BELONG_TO_USER: This scan belongs to another user.
errors.passwordLength: The password must be at least 10 characters.
errors.nameLength: The name must be at least 2 characters.

support.title: Support StickerTrack
support.description: StickerTrack is free and independent. If it helps you organize your collection, you can voluntarily support the development and maintenance of the project.
support.voluntary: Support is entirely optional, and StickerTrack remains fully available to everyone who does not contribute.
support.howItHelps: Support helps maintain the infrastructure, fix issues, and develop improvements for StickerTrack.
support.noBenefits: Supporting the project does not unlock additional features, benefits, or exclusive access.
support.independenceNotice: Contributions support only the development of StickerTrack. The project is unofficial and is not affiliated with, authorized by, or associated with publishers, sports organizations, or owners of the mentioned trademarks.
support.button: Support on Buy Me a Coffee
support.buttonAriaLabel: Support StickerTrack on Buy Me a Coffee in a new tab
support.notConfigured: The external support link is not configured at this time.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This text explains in plain language how StickerTrack handles data while the service is used.
privacy.legalReview: This informational baseline must receive legal review before public launch.
privacy.accountBody: We process name, email, a hashed password, and language preference to authenticate and personalize the account.
privacy.usageBody: We store collections, quantities, and necessary scan history. Scanner images are processed locally and are not uploaded or stored; only necessary text results may be sent.
privacy.externalBody: Wikidata and Wikimedia Commons may provide approved data and images. The browser uses local storage for the session and a language cookie. Buy Me a Coffee is only an external link.
privacy.retentionBody: Technical logs may include request and user identifiers, without passwords or tokens. Deletion anonymizes personal data and removes collections and scans; minimum administrative records may remain for audit.
privacy.contactBody: The contact channel must be defined before launch. StickerTrack is independent and is not affiliated with publishers, sports organizations, or brand owners.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: By using StickerTrack, you agree to use the service lawfully and responsibly.
terms.legalReview: These terms must receive legal review before public launch.
terms.accountBody: You are responsible for accurate information, password protection, and reporting unauthorized access. Accounts may be limited in cases of abuse or risk.
terms.usageBody: The service may experience downtime, errors, or changes. Security violations, abusive automation, and malicious content are prohibited.
terms.externalBody: External data and images belong to their sources and licenses. Links such as Buy Me a Coffee lead to independent services.
terms.retentionBody: Absolute availability is not promised. Users may delete their accounts; data may remain only when needed for security, audit, or applicable obligations.
terms.contactBody: StickerTrack is an independent project with no official association with mentioned brands. A responsible contact must be published before launch.

footer.independence: StickerTrack is an independent tool for managing collections and has no affiliation, authorization, or association with publishers, sports entities, or trademark owners mentioned.

actions.publicDesc: Other people can view your collection
actions.privateDesc: Only you can view your collection

import.instructions:
Paste a list in the format [Quantity] [Code] (e.g., 2 BRA 10).
Or select a .txt file.
import.fileLoaded: File loaded. Review and click Sync.

export.title: Export your Collection
export.description: Generate a plain text file with all the stickers you own. Ideal for backup or sharing.

stickerExplorer.title: Sticker Explorer
stickerExplorer.description: Search, filter, and manage your entire collection in one place.
